data.title: AI, digital currencies and real-time payments drive global payments shake-up
data.description: BCG identifies five structural forces reshaping payments: agentic AI, digital currencies, financial technology disruption, real-time transfers and cost transformation.

data.title: Netflix, AB InBev forge multi-year partnership around beer, content, and commerce
data.description: For Netflix, the alliance with Anheuser-Busch highlights its push to expand commerce opportunities around entertainment.

data.title: Mercado Libre expands into B2B with launch of Mercado Libre Negocios
data.description: Since testing began in late 2024, more than 4 million users across Latin America have been authorized to make wholesale purchases through Mercado Libre Negocios.

data.title: Blain's partnership with AI providers to boost supply chain efficiency
data.description: Blain's Farm & Fleet is working with Relex and Logic, using AI to boost the retailer's supply chain efficiency and customer experience.

data.title: ThredUp rebrand rethinks identity to emphasize AI and tool updates
data.description: After launching AI search and discovery, ThredUp now has a new visual emblem to accompany its tools for buyers and sellers.
